name: Browse...
description: Opens a file requester to select the folder to process.
notes: Uses ASL library DrawersOnly mode to select directories.

name: Order
description: Sets the sort priority: Folders First, Files First, or Mixed.
notes: Controls whether folders appear before files in the sorted layout.

name: Sort By
description: Selects the attribute to sort icons by: Name, Type, Date, or Size.

name: Cleanup subfolders
description: When enabled, processes all subfolders recursively.
notes: Respects the Skip Hidden Folders setting in Advanced options.

name: Backup icons using LhA
description: Creates LhA archive backups of .info files before making changes.
notes: Backups can be restored from the Restore Backups window.

name: Position
description: Controls where folder windows are positioned after processing.
notes: Options: Center Screen, Keep Position, Near Parent, No Change.

description: Displays help information about window position options.

name: Advanced...
description: Opens the Advanced Settings window for fine-grained control.
notes: Provides access to aspect ratio, spacing, and layout optimization settings.

name: Fix Default Tools...
description: Opens the Default Tool Analysis window to scan and repair default tools.
notes: Scans icons for missing or invalid default tool references.

name: Restore Backups...
description: Opens the Restore Backups window to recover previous icon states.
notes: Lists all available backup sessions with date and folder information.

name: Start
description: Begins tidying icons using the current settings and selected folder.
notes: Triggers the main processing loop; obeys backup and recursive options.

name: Exit
description: Closes the iTidy application.

name: New
description: Resets all settings to their default values.

name: Open...
description: Opens a saved preferences file to restore previous settings.

name: Save
description: Saves current preferences to the last saved file location.
notes: If no previous save exists, prompts for a file location.

name: Save as...
description: Saves current preferences to a new file location.

name: Close
description: Closes the iTidy application.

name: Layout Aspect Ratio
description: Sets the target width-to-height ratio for folder window layouts.
notes: Options: Tall (0.75), Square (1.0), Compact (1.3), Classic (1.6), Wide (2.0), Ultrawide (2.4).

name: Overflow Strategy
description: Controls how the layout expands when icons exceed the target aspect ratio.
notes: Options: Expand Horizontally, Expand Vertically, Expand Both.

name: Icon Spacing X
description: Sets the horizontal spacing between icons in pixels.
notes: Range: 0-20 pixels.

name: Icon Spacing Y
description: Sets the vertical spacing between icons in pixels.
notes: Range: 0-20 pixels.

name: Min Icons Per Row
description: Sets the minimum number of icons per row in the layout.
notes: Integer gadget for direct number entry.

name: Auto Max Icons
description: When enabled, automatically calculates the maximum icons per row based on window size.
notes: Disables the manual Max icons field when checked.

name: Max Icons Per Row
description: Sets the maximum number of icons per row when Auto Max is disabled.
notes: Integer gadget; disabled when Auto Max Icons is checked.

name: Max Window Width
description: Limits the maximum folder window width as a percentage of screen width.

name: Align Icons Vertically
description: Controls vertical alignment of icons within their layout cells.
notes: Options: Top, Middle, Bottom.

name: Reverse Sort (Z->A)
description: Reverses the sort order from ascending to descending.

name: Optimize Column Widths
description: Adjusts column widths to minimize unused space in the layout.

name: Column Layout (centered columns)
description: Centers icons within their columns for a more balanced appearance.

name: Skip Hidden Folders
description: Excludes folders without .info files from recursive processing.
notes: Only affects recursive mode.

name: Strip NewIcon Borders
description: Removes rectangular borders from NewIcons during processing.
notes: Requires icon.library v44 or higher; disabled if not available.

name: Beta Options...
description: Opens the Beta Options window for experimental features.
notes: Contains logging and debugging options.

name: OK
description: Saves changes and closes the Advanced Settings window.

name: Cancel
description: Discards changes and closes the Advanced Settings window.

name: Auto-open folders after processing
description: Automatically opens processed folders on Workbench after tidying.
notes: Experimental feature; may not work in all configurations.

name: Find and update open folder windows
description: Updates the geometry of already-open Workbench folder windows.
notes: Experimental feature.

name: Log Level
description: Sets the verbosity level for log files.
notes: Options: DEBUG (Verbose), INFO (Normal), WARNING, ERROR.

name: Enable memory allocation logging
description: Logs all memory allocations and frees for debugging.
notes: May impact performance; useful for finding memory leaks.

name: Enable performance timing logs
description: Logs timing information for performance analysis.

name: OK
description: Saves changes and closes the Beta Options window.

name: Cancel
description: Discards changes and closes the Beta Options window.

name: Browse...
description: Opens a file requester to select a folder for scanning.

name: Filter
description: Filters the tool list by status.
notes: Options: Show All, Show Valid Only, Show Missing Only.

name: Tool List
description: Displays all discovered default tools with their status and usage count.
notes: Selecting a tool shows files using it in the details panel below.

name: Details List
description: Shows files that reference the currently selected default tool.

name: Replace Tool (Batch)
description: Replaces the default tool in all icons that use the selected tool.
notes: Opens the Default Tool Update window in batch mode.

name: Replace Tool (Single)
description: Replaces the default tool in a single selected icon.
notes: Opens the Default Tool Update window in single mode.

name: Restore Default Tools Backups...
description: Opens the Default Tool Restore window to undo previous tool changes.
notes: Restores from CSV backup sessions.

name: Scan
description: Scans the selected folder for icons and builds the tool cache.
notes: Validates each default tool by checking if it exists on the system PATH.

name: Close
description: Closes the Default Tool Analysis window.

name: New
description: Resets the folder path to SYS: and clears the tool cache.

name: Open...
description: Opens a previously saved tool cache file.

name: Save
description: Saves the current tool cache to the last saved file.

name: Save as...
description: Saves the current tool cache to a new file.

name: Close
description: Closes the Default Tool Analysis window.

name: Export list of tools
description: Exports the list of default tools to a text file.

name: Export list of files and tools
description: Exports the complete list of files with their default tools to a text file.

name: System PATH...
description: Displays the current system PATH search list used for tool validation.

name: Browse...
description: Opens a file requester to select a new default tool program.

name: Update Progress
description: Shows the progress and status of each icon being updated.
notes: Read-only; displays SUCCESS, FAILED, or READ-ONLY for each file.

name: Update Default Tool
description: Applies the new default tool to the selected icon(s).
notes: Creates a backup if default tool backup is enabled in preferences.

name: Close
description: Closes the Default Tool Update window.

name: Folders
description: Displays a tree view of folders included in the selected backup run.

name: Close
description: Closes the Folder View window.
